sections.paragraph:
Original: מקניהוּ

Transliteration: miqnêyâhû

Phonetic: mik-nay-yaw'-hoo

BDB Definition:

Mikneiah = "possession of Jehovah"
  1. one of the Levites of the 2nd rank, gatekeepers of the ark, appointed by David to play in the temple band

Origin: from H4735 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
